v3_model.leagues: 5 ligi top europene (EPL, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1)
v3_model.approach: Stacking ensemble cu 3 base learners + LR meta-learner. 40 features (ELO, forma venue-split, momentum, H2H).
v3_model.notes: Date publice (football-data.org + OpenFootball). Fara xG, fara date jucatori.

literature_studies.approach: Statistic clasic — distributii Poisson + corectie tau pentru scoruri mici
literature_studies.notes: Modelul fundamental in statistica fotbalului. Standard pentru benchmark.
literature_studies.citation: Dixon, M.J., Coles, S.G. (1997). Modelling association football scores. JRSS C, 46(2), 265-280.

literature_studies.approach: Bayesian network cu variabile latente (forma, calitate). Iesire calibrata.
literature_studies.notes: A batut bookmaker-ii pe acel test set. Standard academic.
literature_studies.citation: Constantinou, A.C., Fenton, N.E. (2013). Profiting from an inefficient association football gambling market. JQAS.

literature_studies.model: k-NN + recency-weighted features (rated #1 in Soccer Prediction Challenge)
literature_studies.approach: Feature engineering manual + k-NN cu metrici personalizate. Castigator competitie.
literature_studies.notes: Castigator Soccer Prediction Challenge 2017. Demonstreaza ca features bune > algoritmi complecsi.
literature_studies.citation: Berrar, D., Lopes, P., Dubitzky, W. (2019). Incorporating domain knowledge in machine learning for soccer outcome prediction. Machine Learning, 108(1).

literature_studies.approach: Pi-rating + gradient boosting + multi-task learning. SOTA pe accuracy.
literature_studies.citation: Hubácek, O., Šourek, G., Železný, F. (2022). Learning to predict soccer results from relational data with gradient boosted trees. Machine Learning.

literature_studies.leagues: EPL, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1
literature_studies.approach: Bayesian hierarchical cu time-varying team strengths.
literature_studies.notes: Bun pentru calibrare. Slab pe accuracy, bun pe RPS.
literature_studies.citation: Tsokos, A., Narayanan, S., et al. (2019). Modelling outcomes of soccer matches. Machine Learning.

literature_studies.approach: Modele proprietare cu insider data, lineup updates, stiri etc.
literature_studies.notes: Limita superioara teoretica accesibila modelelor publice.
literature_studies.citation: Various — typically reported in academic studies as benchmark

literature_studies.notes: Limita inferioara — daca modelul nu o bate, nu invata nimic.

literature_studies.approach: Predictie constanta pe clasa majoritara (Home Win).
literature_studies.notes: Baseline naiv — exploateaza doar avantajul terenului.
